zh.Linstead Magna, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可林斯亞德 馬尼亞
zh.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker是Mrs William Parker的女兒，於1476年出生在英國素福爾可迪斯頓。她於大約1498年與Sir Henry Everard在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Linstead Magna, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可林斯亞德 馬尼亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker是Mrs William Parker的女儿，于1476年出生在英国素福爾可迪斯頓。她于大约1498年与Sir Henry Everard在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: Olyve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval given name, Oliff(e), derived via French from the Late Latin name Oliva, which was borne by two obscure early saints. It in turn is derived from the Latin name for the olive tree, and was no doubt adopted at first because of the associations of the olive tree with peaceful productivity and fruitfulness; the olive branch has been a symbol of peace since biblical times. Like many names denoting plants and flowers, it was particularly popular in the early decades of the 20th century. See also Olivia .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker was born in 1476, in Chediston, Suffolk, England as the daughter of Mrs William Parker. She married Sir Henry Everard about 1498, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker est née en 1476, à Chediston, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de Mrs William Parker. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Everard environ 1498, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker wurde 1476 in Chediston, Suffolk, England, als Tochter von Mrs William Parker geboren. Sie hat um 1498 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Henry Everard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker è nata il nel 1476 nel Chediston, Suffolk, England come figlia di Mrs William Parker. Lei sposato Sir Henry Everard circa 1498, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Linstead Magna, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクリンステアド マグナ
ja.Of, Honynge, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルク
ja.Lynnstead, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Fortesset, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.Chediston, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクチェディストン
ja.lifeSummary: Olyve Parkerは1476年にイギリススフォルクチェディストンでMrs William Parkerの娘として生まれた。約1498年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでSir Henry Everardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker(은)는 1476년 영국 수폴크 체디스턴에서 Mrs William Parker의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Sir Henry Everard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker nasceu em 1476, em Chediston, Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de Mrs William Parker. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Everard aproximadamente 1498, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker родилась в 1476 г. в местности чедистон, суффолк, Англия. Её мать звали Mrs William Parker. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Everard около 1498 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Olyve Parker nació en 1476, en Chediston, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hija de Mrs William Parker. Se casó con Sir Henry Everard aproximadamente 1498, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
